title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 21 2021
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 21 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, July 21 2021
summary:
Main
Despite the announcement from OPEC+ that oil production will increase in the coming months, to meet rising demand, the crude market hasremained flat once again this week. Aside from some interest in the suezmax sector, there has been very little to report in the way of period activity. Another quiet week for clean with very little to report in the way of timecharter fixtures.
